displayNameZh: 通用 = 什么都缺了一点
summary: Yt Generic Means Lacking component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「通用 = 什么都缺了一点」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-generic-means-lacking/src/YtGenericMeansLacking.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtGenericMeansLacking` and `ytGenericMeansLackingDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Generic Means Lacking Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-generic-means-lacking to my project. Preserve the exported YtGenericMeansLackingProps API and register the YtGenericMeansLacking composition with the default props.
